[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011110 5
1 1100011 4
2 0001111 4
3 1010001 3
4 1100011 4
5 1110111 6
6 1011110 5
7 1100011 4

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 1101011 5
23 32 1110111 6 match 5
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1110011 5
67 76 1111011 6
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 1111111 a
35 53 1110111 6 match 5
46 64 1011110 5 match 0 6
57 75 1111011 6
60 06 0011111 5
71 17 1111011 6

03 30 1111111 a
14 41 1111110 6
25 52 1100011 4 match 1 4 7
36 63 1110111 6 match 5
47 74 1111111 a
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0111010 4
72 27 1111011 6

04 40 1011111 6
15 51 1101011 5
26 62 1110011 5
37 73 1111111 a
